description: Address review issues from 2025-01-15-100000-review.md: wire dead toggles (ENABLE_QUALITY_CHECKS, ENABLE_SCENE_CONTINUITY), fix resolution preset override in apply_preset(), and guard vae_audio deletion against NameError.
steps: Wire _enable_quality_checks to the quality gate check in generate_pro() by adding `_use_quality_gate = _use_quality_gate and _enable_quality_checks` after the toggle resolution block
Add ENABLE_SCENE_CONTINUITY sync logic in Cell 3.6 (before summary print): if not ENABLE_SCENE_CONTINUITY, set USE_SCENE_CONTINUITY = False
Fix apply_preset() to set RESOLUTION_PRESET = 'Custom' after applying generation preset so that resolution preset does not silently override generation preset's width/height
Guard `del vae_audio` at line 6749 with a try/except NameError to prevent crash when audio loading was skipped
acceptance_criteria: python3 -m py_compile LTX_PRO.py passes without errors
ENABLE_QUALITY_CHECKS=False causes quality gate to be skipped
ENABLE_SCENE_CONTINUITY=False sets USE_SCENE_CONTINUITY=False before generate_pro() runs
apply_preset() with a generation preset does not have its resolution overridden by RESOLUTION_PRESET default
del vae_audio does not crash if vae_audio was never loaded
findings: All 4 fixes verified with py_compile. Issue 4 (no parameter override) skipped as by-design for Colab. Issue 5 (upscale skip AV latents) confirmed architecturally correct - no change needed. ENABLE_SCENE_CONTINUITY sync placed after USE_SCENE_CONTINUITY definition in Cell 5 since Cell 3.6 runs before USE_SCENE_CONTINUITY is defined.
